positive: A vibrant, stylized cosmic forest scene. The composition is centered and symmetrical, featuring enormous, bioluminescent stylized flora with flowing, abstract shapes, resembling deep-sea kelp mixed with futuristic crystalline structures. The primary color palette is deep indigo, electric cyan, and ethereal magenta, creating maximum contrast against rich, velvety black voids. Silhouettes must be clean and bold, making them highly visible on fabric. Incorporate abstract glowing particles and constellations that drift through the foliage. Cinematic volumetric lighting emphasizes the glowing edges of the leaves and structures, giving a mythic, dreamlike quality. Perfect for a t-shirt graphic print, vector art quality, high saturation, pop art influence, digital painting, clean illustration.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, blurry, noisy, grain, artifact, low contrast, bad anatomy, mutation, disfigured, extra limbs, grayscale, photorealistic, human face, writing
